DP.092.0000:
You need a Bicycle to go out on
Cycling Road!
DP.092.0001:
You need a Bicycle to go out on
Cycling Road!\f
DP.092.0002:
Learn how to shift gears, and you’ll
be able to ride anywhere.
DP.092.0003:
[0103,0000], long time, no see!\f
Oh? You look puzzled.
You’re wondering who I am.\f
I’m Professor Rowan’s assistant and
[0103,0001]’s father.\f
I’ve come a long way to help you on
your adventure at the professor’s\r
behest.\f
[0103,0000], let me ask you,
how many Pokémon have you met?\f
DP.092.0004:
[0103,0000], long time, no see!\f
Oh? You look puzzled.
You’re wondering who I am.\f
I’m Professor Rowan’s assistant and
[0103,0001]’s father.\f
I’ve come a long way to help you on
your adventure at the professor’s\r
behest.\f
[0103,0000], let me ask you,
how many Pokémon have you met?\f
DP.092.0005:
Oh, my!
You’ve met [0134,0001] Pokémon!\f
Wonderful! Yes, bravo!
Professor Rowan should be delighted!\f
Here is something for you!\f
DP.092.0006:
A Pokémon holding an Exp. Share
will be given some of the Exp. Points\r
from battle.\f
It will get Exp. Points even if it
didn’t actually battle.\f
I would say an Exp. Share is quite
useful for raising weak Pokémon.\f
Also, a Pokémon you get in a trade
may disobey you if it is too high\r
in level.\f
Don’t worry, though. It will obey if
you have enough Gym Badges.
DP.092.0007:
You’ve met only [0134,0001] Pokémon?\f
Hmm...
You’ve got to find at least 35.\f
If you can’t, it will be tough to
complete the Sinnoh Pokédex.
